description_long: This is a modern, mid-century style sofa upholstered in a muted olive green fabric. The seat features a single, long cushion with a tufted pattern, providing a structured yet comfortable appearance. Two rectangular back cushions rest against a straight, continuous backrest, and two matching cylindrical bolster pillows are positioned at each end. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, aligning with the height of the backrest for a cohesive silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, dark legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a floating effect. The overall design is clean, geometric, and well-suited for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern olive green sofa with tufted seat, straight padded armrests, and two back cushions, supported by short recessed legs. Its clean lines and structured form evoke a mid-century aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, tufted seat cushion, two back cushions, and both armrests with bolster pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the boxy armrest, the depth of the seat, and the alignment of the backrest with the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest, seat depth, and backrest alignment.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One long, tufted seat cushion; two rectangular, loose back cushions; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy, padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest with a clean, geometric profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark, recessed legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and giving a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with two loose rectangular cushions, medium height, no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid olive green fabric with a tufted seat cushion; overall matte finish with no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
